description: When the user enables app lock, the app calls Android BiometricPrompt API to verify identity via system-level fingerprint or face recognition. Access is granted only on successful verification. The app only receives the success/failure result and never accesses raw biometric data.

flow_steps.details: When the user opens the app or returns from background (based on timeout config), the BiometricPrompt system dialog is shown.
The Android BiometricPrompt handles fingerprint/face recognition through the TEE (Trusted Execution Environment). The app only receives the callback result.

flow_steps.code: fun handleAuthenticationResult(result: AuthenticationResult) { if (result == SUCCESS) { unlockApp() } }
flow_steps.details: The app processes the verification result: unlocks the UI on success, stays locked otherwise. Biometric data is neither stored nor transmitted.
